message:
test(multi): add pure-logic unit tests across 8 packages

Coverage improvements:
- output: StatusBadge, AgentBadge, StyledTable compact/default
- agent: ProfileName (all types + empty), Recommendation.String
- agent/ollama: classifyError (nil, connection refused, timeout, passthrough)
- bv: isNoBeadsDBError, containsString
- cli: truncateWithEllipsis, uniqueStrings, countAgentStates, escapeShellQuotes
- ensemble: absInt, provenance IsActive/ContextHash/Count/Stats/Export
- robot: paginationHintOffsets edge cases (nil, zero/negative limit, last/single page),
         ApplyPagination empty/limit-exceeds-total

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
